$comment: Central registry of feature prerequisites (issue #25). Consumed by hooks/check-prereqs.mjs (SessionStart notice), the project-initializer agent (init/update-time check), and skills that need install hints. Add an entry here whenever a feature gains an external requirement — never hardcode prerequisite checks in individual skills or hooks. An entry may carry a `requiredWhen` gate {config: <dotted path in agenticaiplugin.config.json>, equals: <value>} so a prerequisite for an opt-in feature is only probed when that feature is enabled.

features: all plugin hooks (SessionStart, PostToolUse, Stop, UserPromptSubmit)

hints.win32: winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS  — new shells only: restart Claude Code afterwards
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code  (the Claude Code CLI must be on PATH for the background reviewer)
